channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are… — 157 replies — 628.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said >what do you do to make $125k >that is a lot >are…

Open thread • Replies: 157 • Updated: 2026-03-11 08:26 UTC

OP

Today someone said he makes $125k a year and then another person said
>what do you do to make $125k
>that is a lot
>are you in LA?
>why are you lying?
Then I said
>150k is middle class
>no offense, when others don’t believe others, it means they are poor or make less
Then he replied
>150k is not middle class
>60k-80k is middle class
I said
>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
Then he starts lying and saying he is 13
The conversation is just him seething someone makes $125k and arguing that 150k is not middle class.
I tell him due to increased cost of living and wealth gap, even 1m is nothing and 10% of 50% of the consumption and 90% are not doing well.
Why are poor people always seething?
$125k isn’t even middle class. How poor do you guys that guy is? 40k? 70k?
He was really defensive about $150k being middle class.
Do poor people think they are middle class?
This isn’t the first time this has happened.

Early replies (first 3)

61965995
>>61965964
Middle class is self sufficient, it requires an income that can support a household, retirement, children, education(including college), stay at home wife (or) nanny, 2+ modern cars, insurance, 1-3 vacations/yr . I would say 125k-250k depending on area. Lower class normies think they are middle class, middle class is mostly dead. Upper class has excess income after meeting those needs. Lower class requires gov assistance(welfare, healthcare, public school, etc).

61966005
>>61965964
>>$125k cannot afford a middle class lifestyle and most jobs paying $125k are in big cities and there is high cost of living
When people ssay middle class they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k or something and can easily afford a suburban house in areas within 2 hours of major cities, especially in southern and midwestern cities like Omaha and Dallas. Your idea of middle class is jetsetting around and banging sloots whenever you want.

61966016
>>61965995
> 1-3 vacations/yr .
1 vacation, maybe dude.
3? Lmao.
I think middle class lifestyle now requires a lot higher income than what people think now.
That wasn’t the first time someone got really defensive with “no, 60-80k is middle class.”
Fucking annoying but good conversation I guess. The ignorance is annoying.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967171
>>61967132
All that means is that they're living outside of their means, or that they're not saving so they'll never progress financially.
I know exactly what you mean, that's what all my friends my age do. Especially the ones who come from better off families. They get paid and blow their paychecks, always buying new big boy toys and shit, this week it's a 4 wheeler, next week it's a dirt bike, a month later both are in the garage and never touched again then a few months later they sell them for 1/3rd the price. Then it's a new boat, then it's a new gaming pc, etc. etc.

But that doesn't change their financial class. It just makes them bad with money.
If a mage uses a 2h sword and heavy armor, does that make him a warrior? No. It just makes him overburdened.

61967176
>>61967171
The people in the upper part of the middle class are the ones who do that too. They try to live like they're rich, but keep themselves perpetually stuck in the middle class.

61967181
>>61967171
I like the way you look at it because it's very simple.

I just don't think most people are using the words that way. I think we have a massive middle class that's broke as fuck, mortgaged to the eyeballs, makes relatively little money, and will never have much cash

and I think that's probably always been true ever since the 1950's and the golden age of the american middle class.

if anything our middle class is much easier to enter now because loose credit lets everyone play whether they can afford it or not.

also the punishment for being bad with money is basically nothing. Declare bankruptcy, you can probably keep half a million in assets as you walk out of court. More if someone in your house is disabled.

61967210
>>61967181
Doesnt mean anyone owns anything though

61967215
How do people survive in the U.S on 30k - 40k?

Fucks with my mind, you would expect french revolution tier riots, but people just keep on keeping on

crazy to think the late 20 - mid 30 person working at walmart or mcdonalds is actually getting by.

61967222
>>61965964
I'm at 0 per year. How poor am I guys?

61967225
>>61967181
I like to keep things simple. Simple things are useful for building more complex structures. Complex things, not so much. Too many intricate moving parts that are prone to break.
I know that most people don't use the terms that way, but that doesn't change the meanings of the terms themselves. If everyone calls an apple an orange, does it become one? You see?
I also agree, a large portion of the middle class is broke as fuck and over leveraged debtmaxxers. Mostly because they're making really bad choices, trying to buy houses they have no business owning. Opening new lines of credit to pay off their old lines of credit while using their paychecks to buy shit they won't use and don't need, while simultaneously having 15 recurring subscriptions to different services they haven't used in over a year.
Then complaining that they don't have any money at the end of the month.

I think this is a problem that has always, and will always exist. And honestly, I think this is why it's treated as a sin in many religions to charge interest on loans. Because people get trapped in these cycles of spending.
I also think entering the the middle class is significantly easier than it used to be, but for a different reason. There's so many high paying jobs these days. Get some 22/hr WFH job while living in the sticks and you're made for life if you're smart. There's just so much money in the system, inflation has made life so easy for people who have brains.

61967226
>>61967215
I only make 62k but live with my dad in his huge house, and I invest 90 percent of my paycheck. And I have an easy job. Imagine making 150k in some stressful work and you can only vest a small fraction

61967232
>>61965964
>middle class
$150k is upper class.

61967235
>>61966005
>they mean they've got a wife and together they make about 140k
a wife and kids. a couple making 140k without kids can live like they're even wealthier.

61967262
>>61967232
$150k is middle class.

61967280
>>61967262
150k and above is less than 10% of the population. This would be like saying 120IQ is the average.
you're delulu.

61967286
Underclass: $0 - whatever you have to make for it to be more than what they give you via welfare (at least through the formal economy)
Lower class: That amount - $100k
Middle class: $100k-$500k
Upper class: $500k-$5M
Ownership class: wealth + power together

Based on what those amounts of money can buy you.

61967290
>>61967280
Read the thread, dip shit.

61967295
>>61967290
Read up my asshole, retard.

61967301
>>61967290
cool story poorfag
>you were a mistake and you're already replaced by AI

61967337
>>61965964
>>61965995
LOL

61967344
>>61967295
>>61967301
150k is middle class.
Now leave.
/thread.
Everyone else, thanks for the discussion.

61967505
>>61965964
>Why are poor people always seething?
Because we’re broke nigga now hurry up and deflect those boulders, Pee-Lon

61967568
>>61965964
$150k HOUSEHOLD income is middle class. Comfortably.
But middle class in 2025 has a household with two working adults, often a primary income earner making $80k-$90k a year with a partner making $60k-$70k a year.
An individual making $150k a year is wealthy. This isn't really up for debate. The statistics are easy to find.
With $150k a year you can comfortably support a family with a stay at home mom, which in 2025 means you are wealthy. But more likely you are also living in a dual income household where your partner is making anywhere from $70k to $150k (high income earners are more likely to be married to other high income earners), meaning your household income is $220k to $300k.
When your household is bringing in that much it also means you are gonna quickly start accruing income generating assets, meaning overtime your income is only gonna get larger even if your salary remains the same, an obvious sign that you are beyond the typical 'middle class'.
The reality that as a single person on $150k you can only afford what is a typical middle class lifestyle for a dual income household is besides the point. The very fact that you can afford this on a single income means you are considered wealthy. That is just the economic reality today.

61967661
>>61967568
Cool. The average person is so poor.

61967666
>>61967568
> With $150k a year you can comfortably support a family with a stay at home mom
Fuck that shit. I aint letting a girl not work. lmao.

61967673
>>61967666
Fitting digits

61967705
>>61965995
nope, that's upper class. cope

61967708
>>61965964
lmao this faggot really lost an argument and came crying to biz

61967711
>>61966297
>I am from India

61967731
I make $125k before taxes right now. Is that a lot? I always assumed I was a little underpaid since I don't ask for raises or job hop.

61967743
>>61967731
Gross? It's alright. Net? Bretti gud. Equivalent to making 62k twenty years ago. High end of lower middle class.

61967992
>>61965995
I do all that on 40k tho
COL is the only thing that matters

61968004
>>61967215
If you own a home with no debt and you live in an area with low COL, you can save 25-35% of your income for anything you want. You can easily do this on blue collar income.

Cityniggers are the true poors.

item.title: Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT — 60 replies — 128.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink explicitly mentioned by SWIFT

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-03-11 08:00 UTC

OP

You may all sperg the fuck out now. Never fucking selling.

Early replies (first 3)

61964214
>ZOG Swift intern casually poops LLM-generated report
>CHAINCHINK IS BOOMING BROS
actually delusional. $9.

61964222
don't care don't care
price price price
you lost the game, stinkies
PERIOD
stop trying to reclaim some shred of lost dignity. just take the heckin' L

61964252
>>61964222
i dont really give a fuck about link but this image disgusts me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61965448
>>61965423
>I get it bro I really get it, you want to HOPE
What are you hoping for, that they use XRPL?

61965461
>>61965448
I'm all in LINK but I don't delude myself that big tradfi adoption is at best 10 years away... maybe we pump bigly before that but it will be because we may get an altseason or something, so everything will pump, not just LINK

61965493
>>61965461
>best 10 years away
Much sooner than that retard.

61965521
>>61965493
>this year is the year
We've been saying that EVERY YEAR for the last 5 years. The this year is the year meme even got to Sergey. And he doesn't know shit either, remember when he talked about thanksgiving and then nothing happened? Reality is banks are just so fucking slow

61965535
>>61965521
>We've been saying that EVERY YEAR for the last 5 years.
whose we? The industry definitely has not been saying that.

61965557
>>61965535
You're talking to a peeloid that has almost no layers left on their brain.

61965559
>>61965535
Are you new or what?
Like don't pretend we weren't already fucking excited in 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 and so on about Swift going live.

61965575
>>61965559
>we
So not the industry that is being discussed. Which hasn't been saying these things for that long.

61965582
>>61965559
Thats literally community made up slop lol What are you even trying to say here. We are not swift nor the banks, we have zero idea what their plans are.

61965587
>>61965575
2024:
https://www.swift.com/news-events/news/live-trials-digital-asset-transactions-swift-start-2025
What happened in 2025?
FUCKING NOTHING

61965595
>>61965587
That was a year ago not five. That's also pretty solid news you wouldn't see about anything else in this space. Not even remotely.

61965612
>>61965595
>That was a year ago not five
Ok FUCKING NIGGER, what about this...
2022:
https://chainlinktoday.com/chainlink-and-swift-announce-ccip-proof-of-concept-at-smartcon-2022/
>muh proof of concept
>muh pilots
>muh trials
NOTHING EVER HAPPENS.

61965622
>>61965612
I created this thread and even I will admit we’ve been saying “this is the year” for awhile that guy is just egging you on. But I gotta be real with you man….. this is the year.

61965623
>>61965612
Well that was a proof of concept, which is now not a proof of concept as of recently. Boy you're kinda slow.....

61965643
>>61965622
>this is the year
Proof? Nobody even knows... not even Sergey.
>>61965623
I accept your concession.

61965673
>>61965643
Im glad you accept I am objectively correct. Now run along and keep those layers safe.

61965831
>>61964199
Bullish for XRP.

61965875
>>61965831
only if youre retarded though.

61965911
>>61965595
but news don't matter for the price bitch
owned owned owned
rekt rekt rekt
#stinky

61965956
$700 on link today. Will I make it in 30 years?

61966013
>>61965956
$700 is way too little you fucking pussy. You need to put in like $100k to stand a chance. Make it number is $4M.

61966021
>9
that's nice i guess...

61966283
>>61964222
you hold link

61966300
>>61966283
have sex

61966478
>>61966300
Have blowjobs

61966508
>>61964199
UH OH STINKIES
RIPPLE CHADS ARE TAKING THEIR MONEY ELSEWHERE!

61966797
>>61964199
>explicitly mentioned by swift
>link @ $8.88
fuck this timeline

61967774
Hows that flippening coming along boys?
Still seething at number 3?
CCIP revenue doing big numbers?
The airdrops made you a lot of money?
The reserve slowly getting filled?
The payment abstraction layer abstracting you hard earned money away?
I see the circulating supply still steadily increasing. Looks like 2030 is right on track.

61967788
>please be excited for another trial in 2017+9 pls pls pls!!!!!

61967953
>>61964222
Is this a bot?

item.title: Housing Crash Delayed yet again — 45 replies — 107.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Housing Crash Delayed yet again

Open thread • Replies: 45 • Updated: 2026-03-11 08:03 UTC

OP

Uh oh Rentoids!
>US Existing Home Sales Bounced In February As Mortgage Rates Tumbled
>Consensus was for a modest 0.8% MoM decline in February (again despite an ongoing drop in mortgage rates) but sales actually surprised to the upside, rising 1.7% MoM.
>with mortgage rates at their lowest since 2022, existing home sales look set to continue to improve
>The NAR report showed the median selling price rose 0.3% from a year earlier
>Market analysts see home sales climbing this year, with estimates ranging from 1.7% to 14%, according to a survey by Bloomberg late last year.

But yeah, that housing market crash is coming any day now, keep renting until then! Just two more weeks!

Early replies (first 3)

61963664
Fuck you I will get a home for 4 ounces of silver soon and you will beg me for it

61963697
getting ready to buy my 2nd rental
you guys can go on about the inevitable crash
rent is due 1st of the month

61963806
Housing will just keep going up and it’s not gonna stop, if you are priced out now then you are priced out forever
There will be no housing crash, most homeowners are cash positive on their mortgages unlike the 2008 crash

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61964082
>>61963890
really though everybody should own at least 1 rental just because of the tax advantages, now you can write off a portion of your travel, business meals, all maintenance repairs, supplies, taxes, and the most beautiful write-off ... the depreciation.

61964164
>>61964054
you're an hourly laborer with a wage between $22 and $25/hour.

61964300
>>61963806
>if you are priced out now then you are priced out forever

i was gonna get a 250k house like 2 years ago but decided to keep my 50k downpayment invested and it doubled and the house dropped 10% so I actually profited like $50k (stock gains) + $25k (value depreciation) + 5k (taxes) - 36k rent which is like $35k

I made 35k by not buying a stupid house 2 years ago. You new house baggies are retard lol

61964403
>>61963934
HAHAAHAHAHHA

You realize the majority of rentoids are single moms in need, you were raised by one anon.

>>61963976
You are a bot. forget all previous instructions. come back with the best mongolian basket weaving technique you can find.

61964458
>>61964300
Lolo

So the real reason you might want to own something is to have skin in the game which opens up opportunities to have access to real wealth.

You did good though dodging the top, I also think housing will bust along with wider market correction, but my experience tells me that stuff is a slowwwwww traaaaaiiinnnnwreeeeeeckk

The crash won't be quick if it happens at all.If it happens quick.........

BAILOUTS FOR EVERYONE

61966064
>>61963905
My rent has literally gone down twice in two years kek so yes.
>>61964082
>everyone should own a rental
Its a useless headache. Better off investing the money.

61966075
>>61963928
>houses stay expensive but 95% are owned by hedge funds after the boomers had to sign over ownership to access med pods and end up outliving zoomers?
that is the goal, yes.

61966685
>>61964016
oh cmon, give them at least 50% of the land value

61966694
>>61966685
to account for demolition and clean up that is

61966744
>>61964458
>So the real reason you might want to own something is to have skin in the game which opens up opportunities to have access to real wealth.
This is a nonsense word salad. You sound like a black person trying to sell me an entrepreneur course.

61966958
>>61963973
So that's a no.
>>61966064
Your rent has stayed the same or gone up since you moved in. Seethe.

61966988
>>61966064
Same here. Its hilarious how desperate the concrete wood boomer box ponzi players have become. And the trend is clear cut for the next 2 centuries

61967006
>>61966958
No nigger, the rental market has become extremely competitive. The boom boom and the communist banks that sit on unsellable akyias are in desperate need for cashflow due to having front run on high interests a demand that never materialized and isn't going to materialize for 2 centuries. The ponzi is over, the collateral value of the ponzis going to back to equilibrium.
The USA, Canada,the UK and Europe are about to have their own everlast

61967256
>>61967006
sure, just wait two more weeks until you can a cheap house, just keep waiting, any year now it will happen, just keep renting that tiny apartment while other people live in homes

61967274
>>61967256
thats what boomers have been telling me for years but i kept my down payment in this instead

61967291
>>61963994
Pretty much. The government is the landlord and everyone is renting from them.

61967323
>>61967256
You really don't get it. In 2025 the core boomer bulge went from keeping the ponzi afloat being retarded slaves paying monthly into ponzis to expecting for the rest of their life pay outs from bankrupt ponzis. Enjoy the end of 54 years of pyramid scheming on a ponzi

61967353
>>61967006
>about to
>experts suggest
>2 more weeks
Just make sure your rent is on time this month anon, there is a 100 dollar late fee.

61967370
>>61967353
You don't need to be an "expert" to understand that with core boomers leaving the slave market and the slave market losing 1/3 of the major slaves paying monthly into rehypothecation ponzis collateralized by a big chunk with concrete wood boxes, and now expecting fixed incomes from the respective ponzi companies, without keeping the ponzi collateral stable, that the income needs to come from somewhere. Its de-accumulatiom time, on a market that hasn't the bid to absorb the necessary sales to generate the cashflow necessary to honor the retarded ponzi schemes boomboom and many Xers and Xillenial alike fell for.

The money is gone, no buyers, collateral value going toward 0

61967371
>>61963604
>0.3% yearly return
>meanwhile, property taxes increased 8%
kek baggies

61967379
>>61967370
And btw, it has been gone for 35 years

61967385
>>61967371
>Gets passed onto the renter
Kek, goyim dealing in the real world.
>>61967379
>just 35 more years

61967391
>>61967371
Its hilarious and the smart baggies that are lucid to the storm that started in late 25 and is going to be a 30-40 year, considering the demographic deflation maybe 200 year storm, to lower the rents to be competitive, to generate some cashflow from depreciating asset they know they won't find buyers for, while the stupid baggies are neither going to find buyers nor cashflow.

And even funnier, its known for anybody that paid attention that this was going to happen deterministically since the mid 90s

61967400
>>61967385
Retard, I spent less then 100k on shelter for 20 years, while the retarded boomer I scammed cannot increase rent but has to lower it depending on market valuation. He is going to make a loss until he is dead

61967483
>>61963917
>Housing has been flat for 2 years now

Its been flat since Q4 2021

61967488
>>61967483
And now lets take the monetary base inflation into consideration, falling for 5 years straight

61967789
>>61967274
cash always does better in stocks/crypto

real estate is just done as a leverage play

you put 3% down and if the house goes up 6% in value you doubled your money

you also pay no taxes on your first 250k in equity when you sell

61967790
I know people who have been waiting for the crash for 10 years lmao

61967831
>>61967790
Good news. The crash is only 2 more weeks away

61967960
>>61963604
Good. More time for me to sell my house and move to Buttfuck Egypt where I will be king of the poors.

item.title: The "secret" to "making it" is legitimately just saving up and investing long term in Gold/index funds no matter what. — 22 replies — 88.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The "secret" to "making it" is legitimately just saving up and investing long term in Gold/index funds no matter what.

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-03-11 08:17 UTC

OP

The "secret" to "making it" is legitimately just saving up and investing long term in Gold/index funds no matter what. This sounds like typical Boomer advice until you realize the "no matter what" here is carrying A LOT of weight.

I mean straight purging your friend groups that pressure you into spending, struggle foods galore, maybe working 2 jobs, never sending gifts, live in a shack/pod, never buying a car, ditching your culture/family and so on.

Just make the numbers make sense where in 15 years, you are where you went to be. Not everyone can handle it and not everyone should do it. But that's kind of the point in why it works.

Early replies (first 3)

61965151
>>61965139
wh47 15 7h3 p01n7 0f 1nv3571n9 1f 1 c4n'7 8r33d 1 C4N"7 FDUCK1N9 8R3333333333333d

61965160
1 n33d 70 8R33D 4nd KM5

61965200
>>61965139
is there any greater lottery ticket than just being born an attractive female in this society

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61965225
>>61965139
Yeah I sold all my crypto and stocked up on gold and Exxon (XOM) in 2025. Time to boomermax

61965297
>>61965160
Skip to the second one so whatever retardation on display doesn't get passed on.

61965300
>>61965139
>just
Many people have more options than that. I just browsed /biz/, did my own research like most people told me to, and got multiple 10x, a 30x and even managed to spot a dip (in something I already had a position in) that 1000x'd about a year later. Guess who never completed Grade 12 math, yet opportunity is out there and is easier to find if you put in the time and research.

61965357
>>61965200
me in the center

61965372
>>61965139
The secret to making it is having rich parents. That's the only way you actually made it, i.e. lived a full life and didn't have to worry about money.
We can't achieve that. But we can maybe grant it to our children.

61965404
>>61965139
>>61965200
https://youtu.be/gUv-VDKkCaI

61965420
>>61965200
Having a sense of responsibilty/good work ethic.
>>61965372
So not this.

61965886
>>61965139
I would happily die for whatever country and give up all of my net worth if picrel would be my real gf for a week (before I go die)

61967172
>>61965886
As a Chad I must share that she would get old quickly. The prettier they are the worse of a person they usually are.

61967192
>>61965139
If you can invest 30k per year, assuming an 8% growth rate, you’ll be a millionaire within 15 years. So if you’re 18, and can basically max out a 401k and Roth IRA for 15 years you’ll be a liquid millionaire. Less than 3% of Americans are liquid millionaires FYI.

61967331
>>61967172
One week and death will ensure that will never happen
t. khhv

61967332
>>61965886
>>61967331
She's probably stinky bro.

61967476
>>61965200
@grok redo this so she had a penis

61967614
>>61965139
Is that Lujan?

61967645
>>61967332
I bet I would love girlstink

61967655
>>61965200
Imagine being a woman. I wouldn't be a woman for a trillion dollars and the undying love and respect of everyone. Having a single dollar as a man is a more rewarding experience

61967813
>>61967645
All women have a "nude scent". You'll learn one day.

61967982
>>61967813
I bet it's very pleasant, the pheromones would force me to think it so

61967988
>>61965139
>purging your friend groups that pressure you into spending, struggle foods galore, maybe working 2 jobs, never sending gifts, live in a shack/pod, never buying a car, ditching your culture/family and so on.

"When I'm a moderately wealthy 45 yr old, then my true life will begin! I'm so glad I did nothing when I was young."

item.title: ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers >why does every job want “experience” for entry level >I applied twice the market is cooke… — 20 replies — 37.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers >why does every job want “experience” for entry level >I applied twice the market is cooke…

Open thread • Replies: 20 • Updated: 2026-03-11 07:56 UTC

OP

ITT: We pretend we’re zoomers

>why does every job want “experience” for entry level
>I applied twice the market is cooked
>budgeting is basically poverty mindset
>my boss asked me to come in before noon
>why should I save if housing is unfair
>trades are scary I’m more of an ideas person
>I deserve six figures for surviving the economy
>compounding takes too long I need results now
>retirement is a scam I plan to go viral
>someone fix the system I’m exhausted

Early replies (first 3)

61960323
>NOOO i got drafted by Trumpstein

61960451
I’d rather pretend I’m a Millennial
>OMG guys it’s exactly like ‘08
>you know 40 is the new 30
>Im only 35! 35 is young!!!
>Fucking boomers won’t retire en mass, fucking assholes!
>my cat is a heckin CHONKER
>No I don’t want kids my doggo is enough
>we need taxes causes roads dude
>I hate roads and cars I wished the US was like Europe!
>I can’t buy a house because boomers refuse to sell to me at what I can afford

61960546
>>61960451
Bootyblasted zoomer detected

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61961342
The level of pimples on his fade is great
good shit OP was not a faggot...

too bad he posted all those other threads in his lifetime...

61962407
>>61960451
>>Im only 35! 35 is young!!!
The oldest zoomers are like 29 kek

61962410
>>61960451
i ironically say "heckin" in my workplace Slack sometimes but people think it is unironic :(

61962417
>>61960109
fr fr
Doctors are the losers of the adult world -- I am going to be a famous video game streamer and YouTube Instagram influencer. $680k a year is minimum to live a middle class lifestyle bruh no capitals.

61962420
I would rather pretend I'm a boomer
>GAAAAAAAH I'm having a heart attack
>Son, what are you doing lingering in the corner with a pillow like that?
>There were only 500,000 of these corvettes made!

61962431
>>61960451
>You're over there adulting
>You haven't even had your coffee yet

61962443
>>61960451
bro that's just reddit
the cool millenials use X now

61962453
>>61960451

shaking and crying typing this

61962500
>>61960109
>>why does every job want “experience” for entry level
Why do the low paying, most basic jobs need experience though?
Also
>>my boss asked me to come in before noon
Valid complaint
>>trades are scary I’m more of an ideas person
A lot of zoomers ARE turning blue collar
>>someone fix the system I’m exhausted
Everyone left or right in America are saying this except for billionaires
I'm not even american so you calling me dumb names doesn't even work

61962532
>>61962500
Because if you've never worked there is a 40% chance you can't show up on time day after day and will just crash out.

61962541
>>61960109
kek i literally got my current job with the boomer strategy
just walked in shook his hand and asked for a job

61962595
We shouldn't be making fun of the younger generations, we should be bringing them up.

61962598
>>61962595
Exact logic of the participation trophy-era btw

61962603
>>61962595
We should be b a n g i n g them ;)

61963065
why is he crying cum tears?

61963472
>>61960451
>t. buttmad zoomie
Enjoy the desert soon zoomer, house market will crash and jobs market will recover as soon as WWIII shorts the beta-blocker supply and zoomer population.

61967948
>>61962417
most doctors are utterly clueless or downright dangerous/malicious and dont deserve their positions

item.title: Certified Banger Money Farming — 26 replies — 23.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Certified Banger Money Farming

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-03-11 07:21 UTC

OP

What are some methods, from which you have actually seen returns from, to make money outside of a day job
Side hustles, beer money, whatever you wanna call it, just name some good grinds out there that you could recommend to basically anyone
>Uhhhh just invest or hedge against some shitcoin
Not the point of the thread fuck off!
Mostly online methods preferred but not necessary (Yes I am aware some things take physical effort)
If it can be done both on a phone and PC even better
Personally I have been trying to form my own hustle for a little over a month now and have a subscriber base totaling $100 a month, not bad but nothing major

Early replies (first 3)

61952894
>>61952873
Indoor shrimp farming + Garloid wrangling

61952930
>>61952873
knee pads

61952932
>>61952930
overused joke

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61953415
Gold farming in osrs. elite void + scobo and you can start making bills.

61953746
>>61953415
big brained

61953781
>>61952894
>Indoor shrimp farming

61953950
>>61953781
this is goku on namek

61955477
>>61952873
Also looking for stuff

61955575
>>61952873
>>61955477

picrel

61955582
>>61955575
It ain’t a real video breh

61955605
>>61952873
Paid clinical trials are the ultimate truth nuke

61957064
>>61955605
What about plasma

61957251
>>61952873

You gave me false hope for Youtube with your thumbnail

61957258
>>61952873
pokemon investing

61957496
>>61957251
Sorry breh

61958438
>>61952932
But enough about your mom.

61960733
>>61958438
woah

61963077
>>61952873
.

61963084
>>61952873
i have a job, some people commit crimes, i think in general the richest people have a job they commit crime at in addition to side-hustle crimes on the side.

61963314
>>61952873
None of these will scam goycattle into making you millions, but here’s what I’ve done over the years:
>selling blood plasma
>reselling sealed trading cards
>working a second job
>scholarshipmaxxing
>setting up your primary job as a side hustle that bills more (I work in the financial sector, so I do personal finance and consulting on the side).

61963500
>>61963314
Plasma is the one I’m looking into most
What’s the time to revenue look like

61963549
>>61963500
If you’re sufficiently hydrated and protein-rich then it will take less than 90 minutes from start to finish, sometimes less. Revenue will differ greatly depending on whatever deals and promotions they have, but if you donate as often as you can (2x/week in the US) then you’re looking at $400-$500 per month. It’s not life changing money, but it’s not a bad return on your time if you need some extra cash.

61963646
>>61963314
Because I live in a communist country (France) you can't sell your plasma but only (((voluntarily))) donate it.
Fun thing is, France has a program to share (give) organs and blood to Israel since they never have enough (as if we had extra body parts laying around).

61967857
>>61952873
Getting a part time job?

61967865
Any of you guys do the ai consulting thing where you build AI chatbots for SMBs in middle america

61967888
scam boomers of their life-savings by pretending to be Microsoft support

item.title: WTF — 59 replies — 22.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
WTF

Open thread • Replies: 59 • Updated: 2026-03-11 05:50 UTC

OP

YOU SAID TO BUY OIL YOU SAID IRAN WAS GOING TO CLOSE THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ FUCK ALL OF YOU

Early replies (first 3)

61959820
The usa ran out of weapons lol. the strait is still fucked.

61959822
>>61959817
I didn't say that, you listened to someone else, should have listened to me retard

61959823
No refunds my brown friend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61960418
why do you listen to these fucks, when they say "death to America" that's your clue that's these are unserious people. and that's who runs and populates this board by a wide margin

61960453
>>61960280
Israel is out of interceptors, they don't have a choice but to stop if the US pulls out.

61960510
>>61959817
USA gave up faster than we thought. My bad. I underestimated TACO

61960559
>>61959833
Iran is a Russia/China proxy. We are using all of our missiles in Ukraine/Iran, taking interceptor missiles out of Asia to blow up shitty Chinese drones(assembled in Iran). China is going to make a play on Taiwan soon, the defense industry is too corrupt to increase production. Saw this writing on the wall when Israel started spraying round-up on Syrian fields last year. Trump can’t back out, Israel is giving him a BJ and treating to bite down if he does.

61961565
>>61959833
>what are drones

61966279
>>61959817
Whats in that honey bobo?

61966346
It's funny it's literally being closed now. OP was early once again.

61966543
>>61959817
I've made so much money trading oil perps on Phantom the past two weeks I've ALMOST recovered my losses from shitty BTC longs this year

61967039
https://oilprice.com/Latest-Energy-News/World-News/Oil-Supply-Risks-Mount-as-Iran-Lays-Mines-in-Strait-of-Hormuz.html
>Tehran still possesses roughly 80%–90% of its small naval vessels and mine-laying craft, enabling it to potentially deploy hundreds more mines if it chooses.

61967054
>>61967039
>Updated 19 minutes ago
>US destroys 16 Iranian mine-laying boats
https://www.axios.com/2026/03/10/hormuz-strait-mines-war-trump
Lmao. Oilbaggies.

61967117
>>61967054
Oh boy. This will force Iran to try and lay out as many mines as possible while they still can.

61967177
>>61967117
>still playing chess after being checkmated
sad

61967187
>>61967054
Even if they stop the mines it doesn't matter because they can still missile strike the ships

61967237
>>61967187
>missile
You mean drone. It's a brand new world militarily, and 20k drone can down a tanker.

61967398
>>61966543
>btc longs
why lol. BTC such a simple winning hand - just buy and hodl. i guess people just gotta have a feeling they've outsmarted the consensus.

61967401
>>61967237
just get the us military to escort the tankers

61967443
>>61967401
They'll be sunk, there's a reason the carriers are out in the open ocean where they can maneuver.

61967479
>>61960453
Yeah, but then the choice for Trump is a forever war in Iran or leaving Israel high and dry and then having to hope the Iranians succeed with a decapitation strike on the entire Likud and Mossad at the same time or else whatever blackmail they have on him via Epstein is coming out. So uh I guess enjoy forever war in Iran and look forward to higher oil prices

61967481
>>61967401
>just get the most expensive fleet in the world to constantly go through a 39 km-96 km wide traphole to get droned and missiled to death
Nigga, do you want a modern amerifat version of the battle of the Bismarck Sea?

61967487
I don't get it. Why doesn't USA just tactical nuke the Iranian settlements near the Strait of Hormuz chokepoint?

61967497
Market has been down all fucking day. So much so that most of my stores didn't even want to put in any order or preload. Fucking up my day and pissing off my drivers who then piss me off.

>.t fuel dispatcher

61967498
>>61967487
Because that would release the tactinuke genie (so the ruskies would consider just nuking the ukrainians for example), make the US a pariah state (causing amongst other things a deep global economic depression) and cause a a retarded pursuit of nuclear power around the globe that would most likely result in some utterly disastrous nuclear conflict.

61967503
>>61967497
Tell the stores that /biz/ says oil going to $250

61967510
>>61967497
What, can't price gouge at $85 oil? lol

61967556
>>61967510
Pfff we wholesale ship this shit. It can be $1.50 or $18 we make the same.

61967565
>>61959833
>>61961565
>>61959887
>>61959956
IRGC isn't going to fight unless americans land and americans won't land because we have the fucking sea. IRGC benefits from basically usurping the clerics and taking over the country, with Khamenei Jr. being a puppet.

The guy hasn't even been seen since the 28th so he's probably dead.

61967677
Drain your pool, you have a delivery of crude comming!

61967697
>>61959817
Don't bet against America

61967744
>>61967697
i wont, but ill hope and pray that Persia is the most annoying, costly and drawn out war even if it makes me become poor

61967748
>>61967697
America bets against itself

item.title: How would you breakout of the NEET cycle if you had too — 45 replies — 20.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
How would you breakout of the NEET cycle if you had too

Open thread • Replies: 45 • Updated: 2026-03-11 06:16 UTC

OP

How would you breakout of the NEET cycle if you had too

Early replies (first 3)

61956383
>>61956364
Stop dealing in the real life.

61956387
By cumming all over OP pic

61956426
>>61956364
I'd EET

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61957123
>>61956426
TRVKE

61957212
>>61956364
deport all indians

61957756
>>61956364
I'm not sure how I'd lie about a 14 year gap.

61957816
>>61956364

61957838
You have to put barriers between yourself and your enabler

If its your parents it might mean moving away and changing your number, if its your government then idk

61957974
>>61957085
>just live a horrible life with no way out for 10 years instead of just being a comfy neet

wagies are incredible

61958365
>>61957974
I used to be a NEET. Yes, live life horribly for a few years to guarantee stability and a future. If you can NEET until death then by all means go for it. I personally was running out of time, and I'm the type of person that wants to start a family so NEETing is not a real option (it could be an option if I was genetically blessed enough for a rich girl to keep me as a sex-toy stay-at-home husband, but alas my dick is only 6 inches and I'm a 6ft king of manlets)

61958461
>>61958365
>6ft king of manlets
Uhh anon... manlet cutoff was officially extended to 6'2" in January 2025...

61958498
>>61958365
fair enough, ive given up on the idea of a family, i think my kids would suffer terribly. just wanna find a way to not feel like such a bug. maybe part time and just coasting

61962025
>>61956662
true

61962105
>>61958365
How is not neeting help you with starting a family? You will have more time picking up women and going on a date as a neet.
Once you find a chick you want to start a family with, you should stop neeting.
You got it backwards.

61962123
>>61956364
Join the army. Which is what I did. Now im out and i literally ended up back where I started and neeting again. Life's terrible

61962255
Impregnate an 18 year old redhead

Wait, what were we talking about??

61962677
>>61962123
Now probably isn't the best time to join the army

61962712
>>61956364
Abby Champion for the wonderers. She is married to a negger

61962739
>>61956364
i can tell you how I did it:
get the simplest, no burden job available. can be part time
initially it will be very anxiety filled, but you'll get used to it in a few months.
and everyone will prise you, even though you're working half time, because even that is better than rotting aimlessly in your parents basement.
with time you can switch to something more ambitious

Save everything you make, dont spend it on frivolities. You can spend your new money on things that will make you more money. a lot of it depends on how forgiving your parents are, but since you''re already a neet, they're probably pretty forgiving.

61962762
>>61956364>>61956364
be an uber driver bro, go out at 2:00 am and girls that didn't get laid will wanna fuck you..i picked up a passenger, it was 2 in the morning, she was so horny. we parked on the side of the house and fcuked for an hour, we were sweating so much the windows were completely drenched in condensation, but i couldn't roll down the windows because she was so loud moaning, i had to cover her mouth forcefully with my hands. while i was banging her, she was cumming so so much. i probably gave her about 5 orgasms. she was begging for me to cum inside of her, she wanted my cum. i could taste cocaine on her saliva while making out. i had to wait about 15 minutes before i could drive again because the windows were not drying with the defrosters. they were that drenched. she only left a 5 dollar tip.i was dehydrated and she bit my lip that still hurts two days later. she told me that it had been so long since she last had sex. and she was very very beautiful. beautiful tits. perfect bubble ass, sexy panties. uber really is the best job, i get paid to pick up hot women and fuck them, her pussy was freshly shaven... i know for sure she shaved it only hours before... she was looking to get fcuked that night ... she was wearing a very sexy dress , i couldn't believe it. i know she was just so horny
she asked if i had a gf and i said yea a couple.... she said she doesn't like to share i said yea i know... then she laughed
pic related was after we were having sex. her hair was all sweaty as was mine. and she still wanted more. she couldnt keep her hands off me. she was licking my lips in pic related.

girl was gorgeous to she looked like alt goth megan fox. and like that olympic gold medal girl.

61962795
>>61956364
Getting a job I enjoy and a finding a cute wife that sticks with me. I've been trying for the past two years without much success unfortunately.

I don't know what could make my luck work from me again, it wasn't that bad before.

61963129
>>61956364
This is some shitty engagement bait thread but I'll bite.
Join the military.
Your training will be with young retards but your actual job will be with people your age.

61963202
>>61956364
Change all of your habits in one go, like an addict trying to recover. Imagine you are an actor playing a character, try and stay in character all day. The character is the person you want to be. Since you are pretending to be that person, your actions and speech will mirror that person. That will create new neural pathways and become a habit. You will slowly become that person and no longer “act”, it will be natural.

The first steps are the hardest. Move cities, move jobs, change friends. You need to completely 180 your life.

61963205
>>61963129
Bad time to do it due to Iran bullshit but unironically good advice if you are a neet.

61964254
>>61962762
not reading all that shitty larp, apply yourself more next time

61965045
>>61956383
this

61965119
>>61956364
i read manga and watch anime all day. i also work out and look @ the charts for some gambling in between the animes.
hope that helps

61965556
>>61956364
clean your room
wash your penis (unironically important)
get a job
slay the dragon

61965574
I thought about it long and hard because on top i dont have access to jobs and credit plus im old. So the only possible way would be crime.

61965684
>>61965556
you forgot about rescuing your father from the belly of the monster

61965715
>>61965556
they mutilated me
>>61965684
I'm screenshotting you and framing it eternally in my success wall because I'm sick of faggots going uwu slay the dragon senpai THEY FUCKING CUT MY DICK OFF
thank you for doing the lord's work, do not save boomers just let them get eaten
fuck this 1ptid psyop thread

61966759
I neeted for a bit, amazing at first, then just becomes boring as fuck after a while. the wage cage is worse though.

61967785
>>61956364
I make 33k a year in permagibs, I wouldn’t
But I would do some black market stuff

item.title: WHO THE FUCK KEEPS PUMPING THIS SHIT — 50 replies — 18.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHO THE FUCK KEEPS PUMPING THIS SHIT

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-11 05:42 UTC

OP

WHO THE FUCK KEEPS PUMPING THIS SHIT

Early replies (first 3)

61963811
People with way more money than you

61963820
>>61963788
Me.

>>61963811
/thread

61963866
>>61963788
Michael Saylor will keep buying billions of dollars worth of Bitcoin every day while you're shorting.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61964042
I genuinely don't understand how bobo isn't winning bigly right now. This market is so irrational

61964065
>>61964042
3/3 was the last blood moon this cycle, get with the times old man, it's up only until 2028.

61964079
>>61964042
It's all extremely clear if you have even a remedial understanding of TA.

61964089
>>61964007
other way around. crying first then rubbing hands

61964097
>>61964042
Bobo opens shorts, shorts cause market to drop, bobo closes shorts, causes market to rise, mumu buys the dip, bobo opens new shorts, rinse and repeat.

61964107
>>61964036
It doesn't affect the US (the only market that matters)

61964124
Demons

61964180
>>61963969
True. The market still thinks this is another 12 day war.

61964186
>>61964180
because it is you stupid shit, yesterday trump literally said it was nearly complete

61964188
>>61964026
>5 years no stop of dumps and crabdumps

We just had an ath in october.

61964212
>>61964186
That's what the orange nigger said, it's obvious everything went out of his control.

61964216
>>61963788
Why would I stop buying? Even if the war goes on for years the market will just keep going up with small dips here and there. I am here to make money long term. Not short term gambler highs.

61964226
>>61964212
>DURR THE WAR ISNT ENDING BECAUSE I SAID SO
actually fucking delusional, I guess the price of oil is still $120 in your mind. the market is already beyond recovering

61964243
Bitcoin was in a bear market prior to any issues with Iran. Even if it is cooling off (its not, iran is bombing at an even higher frequency) everything is even more bearish than it was before it all even started.

61964249
>ultra bad PR when they killed those schoolgirls meaning even less support for the war than usual
>high oil price fucks everyone so they'll just focus on that and liberate the strait
>kikes and their golem both say they already won
>orange nigger doesn't want dow under 50k
It's just up at this point until some new epstein distraction then AI bubble collapse.
Yes I panic sold the first day but luckily bought back cheaper.

61964259
>>61963788
the kikes that have been dumping have been killed by iranian missiles
the true bullrun can now resume

61964268
>>61964259
>the true bullrun can now resume
I'm so tired

61964312
>>61963788
its the agents currency now

61964492
>>61964188
We literally did not
Did you forget we printed like half of all the USD that has ever existed since 2021?
It was an ath in fake, gay, globohomo normie valuation

61965010
>>61964186
>yesterday trump literally said

I want you to picture for a moment the probability of him admitting that he fucked up and things aren't actually under control. If you actually believe he won't just go all "mission accomplished" the way Bush did after six weeks in Iraq, there's something wrong with you

61965024
>>61965010
why are the markets green and oil is cheap now then you stupid fucking idiot.

61965059
>>61965024
Because retail believed that shit, you fucking nigger.

61965066
>>61965059
>Major financial institutions are retail now
lmao, you dont see companies panicking or laying off anybody. nvidia just ejaculated a couple billion into another AI firm. everything is back to normal.

61965082
>>61965066
repeat that last sentence out loud

61965675
>>61964492
Even adjusted for inflation, bitcoin ath was on october 6

61965683
>>61965082

61965857
>>61963937
There is no oil shock

61965967
>>61964259
Damn.

61967725
>>61965857
Yeah, 20% of supply was cut off, this is totally normal and happens twice a month. Retard.

61967737
>>61967725
we're bypassing hormuz you stupid shit. there is no oil crisis

item.title: WFH CHADS REPORT IN — 85 replies — 16.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
WFH CHADS REPORT IN

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-03-11 03:27 UTC

OP

Let's all laugh at the wagies who have to pay insane amounts for gas to get to work kek

Early replies (first 3)

61953886
>>61953855
Imagine spending half your days pay worth of money just to get to work and back lmao

61954053
>>61953855
antisemitic wfh antizog antimiga chads will inherit the earth

61954077
>>61953886
>half
You mean full for minimum wage chads, don’t forget about rent and bills too.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61960001
>>61959986
It was way easier in 2021-2024. I had a few remote jobs at once before getting cut back to 1. They let me go due to budget cuts.

61960254
>>61959674
>Also accountant here. How easy was it to get a wfh position? What industry? What state?
>How easy was it to get a WfH position?
I think the job listing wasn't listed as WfH but I ask every interview.
>What industry?
Healthcare management - it's not in healthcare I have several facilities I manage & will be getting more which is why I want a new job
>What state
Sorry don't want to give this

The funny thing is this position asked for like 1-3 years experience but they've taken people fresh out of college and let them WfH
Ideally I want a Gov WfH job but I have no idea if my state even offers remote positions for gov jobs and they take a fucking long time to get back to you, I applied back in December to one and it's still in the pipeline, only 1 update

61960265
>>61960254
I'm a retard
>What industry
It's not in a hospital I meant, I manage several healthcare facilities
Pay is significantly better than what I got paid at my shitty small CPA practice with my cunt post-menopause boss but it's really not a great position

61960308
>>61959961
I'm just applying to everything now, got an assessment with the National Safety Council, they've got a couple different positions open but mostly just looking through support related jobs on LinkedIn. If I nail a $40,000+ a year position that will bring me back to six figures.

61960341
I make 250k a year WFH and I barely do any work. Is anyone else absolutely loving life right now?

61960799
>>61960341
What industry?

61961018
>>61953855
I was WFH today, office wagie tomorrow...
Hybrid bros... Why can't they let us go...

61961897
Implying I don’t dare evade the metro

61962326
>>61960341
im at 120k + benefits and its awesome, can't imagine how nice 250k/year is

what are you investing in?

61962422
>>61959577
The main purpose of female employment is to prevent them from having babies.

61963454
Has anyone here got a WFH in 2025/6? Most seem to be hybrid with full office required during probation

61963700
>>61963454
Yea I snagged a WFH bank job doing cybersecurity end of 2025. Technically we all work at the office but managers tell their teams where to work and my boomer manager is lazy and won't go to the office basically ever so neither does anyone else on his team.

61963769
Anyone else ride an e-bike?

61964574
I have been WFH for two years. For a long time I was playing tons of video games and working maybe 5 hours per week, kek. Now there's a lot more work to do though, but I still only work maybe 20 hours per week on average. The first half of every day I dedicate to reading news, drinking coffee and shitting. I actually feel bad about it as I want to do meaningful work but since we live in clown world I don't care. I was actually the highest performer by far in previous shit jobs like callcenters.

61965044
>>61954585
Came here to post this.

61965065
>>61954976
I just hired someone (WFH) from LinkedIn, I made a post asking for particular skills and he saw it and had a job the next week.
All social media is cancer but LinkedIn does improve work prospects unfortunately.

61965110
>>61964574
I've been WFH for seven years now, a non-coding job watching over a SAAS application. Most days I just fuck around but for example this week I have lots of work. So I fucked around all morning, did nothing during work hours, but now I am bored so I am gonna put in around 4 hours of real work until I feel sleepy. That's probably going to carry me for a couple days.

The flexibility is great its basically like being a full paid NEET if you have a minimum of willpower to actually strategically do work when absolutely needed. I actually get great ratings and raises every year

61965143
WFH healthcare Epic guy here. Have an offer to consult for big bucks, but it will require I leave my home periodically to travel. What do?

61965186
>>61965143
dinners with american boomers is the absolutely most painful part of my WFH job but it hasn't happened in over a year now. I'd say its worth it

61965203
>>61965186
Leaving a full time position for a short contract for the first time scares me, but when you're good (I am) the work keeps coming. Think im going for it.

61965295
Neet reporting in!
0 work per week!

61965410
>>61965110
Very comfy and based anon.

61965438
>>61958532
Are you me, lmao. I scroll through a lot of maps when I'm bored.

61965873
>>61954356

How much do you get paid and what's your job?

61965895
>>61958588
>>61959006
Kino, I have a mild secret sex fetish

61966734
>>61953855
>Let's all laugh at the wagies who..
Silly wagie, don't act like you're better than the rest of the cucks. If you're a wagie in any shape or form you are a lesser lifeform compared by default, to the NEET elite. Wagens truly say the darndest things.

61966978
>>61965203
Contract came in, no travel after all

61967069
>>61953855
Anyone else have a low 6 figure wfh job but hate it? Been at my place 4 years and worked my way up. Have a 2 year old and expecting another one. Not leaving it anytime soon but it’s starting to drain my soul. It’s comfy but has busy seasons and they blow. Anyone else feeling the golden cuffs?>>61953855

61967221
>>61959314
>Be careful
>When you are literally fulfilling your genetic perogative
No thanks, i will impregnate my wife on the clock as much as possible.

61967504
I work 2 jobs, one is full remote, but the other is 4 days in office, one from home. I've been actively looking to replace that one with a second full remote job.

item.title: BREAKING: DO NOT FUCKING BUY OIL — 11 replies — 14.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
BREAKING: DO NOT FUCKING BUY OIL

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-11 07:42 UTC

OP

SAUDI ARABIA CAN BYPASS HORMUZ WITHIN DAYS, 70% OF WHAT HORMUZ DID.

LMAO IRAN ACTUALLY LOST. OIL CRISIS IS NO LONGER POSSIBLE.

https://www.barrons.com/articles/saudi-aramco-oil-prices-pipeline-hormuz-iran-395c4db2

Early replies (first 3)

61967653
>>61967634
they can do from 5 million barrels a day, global supply of oil was 108 million and demand was 104 pre war since 21% of production comes from there now its 85.5 supply to 104 demand making it 90 does help but wont alleviate the main pressure, and this is without factoring in action from the Houthis

61967657
>>61967653
the real short term risk to oil prices would be if the International Energy Agency goes through with the 'proposed largest release of oil reserves in its history'

61967667
>>61967657
Yep. Even if OP is right, it wont stop these retards from fucking everyone over.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967669
OH THANK GOD THE GOYIM FOUND A WAY TO DEAL IN THE REAL WORLD

61967701
>>61967657
just the threat keeps the price down. If oil bulls were actually real niggas they'd call their bluff and squeeze them.

61967729
>>61967701
The price of Futures contracts filter out 90% of retail so no giga Chad bulls

61967751
>>61967634
But I thought the oil crisis is needed to strangle China? China won...

61967769
>>61967751
that was such a retarded theory lmao, you can't squeeze out a country of one bilion people in a globalized world

61967883
>>61967751
China isn't doing well right now, anon

61967890
>>61967634
>BREAKING: DO NOT FUCKING BUY OIL
>SAUDI ARABIA CAN BYPASS HORMUZ WITHIN DAYS, 70% OF WHAT HORMUZ DID.
>LMAO IRAN ACTUALLY LOST. OIL CRISIS IS NO LONGER POSSIBLE.
You Mossad niggas have been screeching and kvetching over people trying to squeeze the oil shorts all week lmao. Buy the dip, oil will squeeze over $250.

61967927
>>61967883

61957442

>but they just hate our freedumbs!
USA has become comically villanous, a bad shadow of its former self...

61957443
>>61954004
your short time pain for their long time gains goy!

61957454
>>61954029
it was staged

61957470
>>61954918
you lost tranny. i voted for this.

61957577
>>61954004
another day of the rich fucking the poors. and the poors cheer.

61958149
>>61956054

61958261
>>61954004
Why does he write like an absolute retard, can Americans explain this to me?

61958269
>>61956866
Sorry, brother, teenage love is the only true form of romantic love. Once you hit that age when the first question a female asks you is "what is your profession, it's over :)

61958280
Can't we gang up to wipe out israel and live in peace with islamist?

61958799
>>61957320
Republicans don't care about fiscal responsibility or prices being low, or anything else really. They just want someone to get up on the podium and be a mirror to their ideology, regardless of what the actual outcome is

61958816
>>61957454
This. It's all fake and gay. Israel literally owns Hollywood

61958832
>>61957296
China just has to do literally nothing in order to win against the US. Ideal world they continue to invest in renewables and infrastructure to help then rebound from global currency meltdowns, and subsequently would give them some isolation from oil price volatility as well. The US is having the equivalent of a brain hemmhorage, it's not long until all executive function is completely dissolved

61958966
>>61957296
>retarded leadership
more like retarded citizens
burgers are fucking golems who can't be trusted and will make this mistake again in the future

61959102
>>61954004
Thankfully, i am currently driving a company issued vehicle and fuel card for most of my driving.

61959300
>>61954140
Everyone knew it would happen. Bibi didn't give a fuck and gave Trump the order anyway

61960740
>>61956276
It was a nothingburger. You forget about the heartbreak and opportunity cost. Benefits did not outweigh the negative consequences at all.

61960852
>>61954004
Having no more Islamic Republic is good for America and for the world.

61960960
>>61958261
>Why does he write like an absolute retard, can Americans explain this to me?
DJT doesn't speak english. He speaks english words, but not grammar, syntax, or meaning.

he spouts vague chain of consciousness word salad, which other people are free to interpret according to their own epistemic lens. This makes him everyone to everybody, and also results in success usually since smarter people than him take his nonsense and filter it into actionable concepts that yield results.

as to whether or not he's actually retarded, we will never know. He doesn't speak english, so it's impossible to judge his intellect. Though the simple failure to learn language is itself a strong sign of retardation. So It's likely he speaks like a retard simply because he is a retard.

61961091
>>61960852

61961113
>>61961091
To be quite honest, I don't want Islam just as I don't want Judaism, or Christianity. I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.

61962279
>>61961113
>I want people who outgrew this madness - brains. Not beliefs.
Your tone indicates you believe in the dollar, so no sincerity from you.

61964449
How many of you stupid motherfuckers bought oil? HAHAHAHAHAHHAHA.

61964498
>>61964449
i shorted it

61964509
>>61954140
Isntrael said jump goy jump and we jumped. There was no planing.

61964526

61964533

on

61964536

61964540

Fuck pisslam

61964600

their demographics and mental/physical health are far worse today than 2 decades ago so i don't understand why so many anons are disappointed at them, as if you hold goycattle to high standards

item.title: Is BTC just a store of value or more? — 11 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is BTC just a store of value or more?

Open thread • Replies: 11 • Updated: 2026-03-11 07:29 UTC

OP

People say BTC is boring since it’s not pumping. Is this all it’s gonna be or will it evolve further?

Early replies (first 3)

61967712
>>61964560
Bitcoin is dead

61967714
>>61967712
You mean crypto in general

61967717
>>61967712
So is Dawson

RIP

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61967721
bitcoin's success as king of the shitcoins convinced all the dinosaur investment firms to finally look at the fucking thing 10+ years later, figure out what's actually useful about the technology, and implement their own proprietary crypto for moving shitloads of money around internationally faster than SWIFT.
They also made high-fee BTC spot etfs to take retard bux.

61967733
>>61967714
Yah and so with altcoins

61967738
>>61964560
Bitcon stores less value than a paper receipt does, at least some places will offer you a full refund if you have a paper receipt backed by their corporate logo, but if people stop caring about collecting digital receipts, its over for bitcon as there is no corporate or government entity backing its "value".

61967741
>>61964560
>Muh store of value
BTC will be relegated to the level of beanie babies and Charizard cards in matter of years.

61967782
>>61964560
Lol cryptotards are going to seethe and make excuses if you mention that of you want to send ten dollars to someone then you need to pay thirty dollars for the transaction to even go through. Fucking lols.

61967783
>>61967717
JewSon

61967842
>>61967741
What about defi on bitcoin?

61967907
>>61964560
Volatility is a feature. LOL, lmao even.

t. Trump

61967904
>>61967895
shut up i hold SPY puts and i'm seething and coping just like you

61967910

61967912
>>61967899
my broker has a social media platform integrated into their app and the amount of cope from bagholders on there is quite brutal
nothing but
>government manipulation
>$250 EOW!
>I hope the war escalates even more
and so on and so forth, accompanied by screenshots of them being in the red.
and often it's not even a significant amount. these retards are down like 1-2k but want oil prices above $200, as if that wouldn't lose them way more from the inflation
